trades.label: Plumbers
trades.h1: Plumbing Jobs Don’t Wait. Your AI Receptionist Doesn’t Either.
trades.metaTitle: AI Receptionist for Plumbers | Never Miss a Callout | Jackal AI
trades.metaDescription: Jackal AI answers your plumbing calls 24/7 — burst pipes, blocked drains, hot water emergencies. Captures the details, books the job, texts you a summary. From $249/month.
trades.ogTitle: AI Receptionist for Plumbers — Never Miss a Callout
trades.heroSub: Burst pipe at 11pm. Blocked drain on a Sunday. Jackal answers in under a second, captures the details, books the job — while you’re on another site or flat out asleep.

painPoints.heading: Emergency callouts go to whoever picks up first.
painPoints.body: You’re the fourth number they called. The first three didn’t answer. Neither did you. That burst pipe job — $800 minimum — just went to the plumber who had an AI answering. It doesn’t have to.

painPoints.heading: You can’t take a call from under a house.
painPoints.body: You’re in a crawl space. Under a sink. Elbows-deep in a drain. Phone rings, you can’t get to it. By the time you call back, they’ve found someone else. Jackal picks up while your hands are full.

painPoints.heading: Not every call is urgent — but every call needs an answer.
painPoints.body: Jackal captures the urgency level so you know what needs a call back in 10 minutes and what can wait until you’re off site. No more burning the end of your day returning calls that sorted themselves.

howItWorks.title: You’re on a job
howItWorks.body: A homeowner calls about a burst pipe at 11pm. You’re asleep, or still on another site.

howItWorks.title: Jackal answers
howItWorks.body: Your AI receptionist picks up, captures their name, address, what’s happening, and the urgency level.

howItWorks.title: Job’s booked
howItWorks.body: Slot lands in your calendar. You get an SMS with everything you need. Customer thinks they spoke to your receptionist.

faqVariants.q: Can the AI handle after-hours emergency plumbing calls?
faqVariants.a: That’s exactly where it earns its keep. Jackal answers 24/7 including weekends and public holidays — captures the caller’s details, flags the urgency, and books the job or sends you an immediate alert. Emergency callouts are your highest-value work. You shouldn’t be losing them to voicemail.

faqVariants.q: What does the AI say when someone calls about a burst pipe?
faqVariants.a: It stays calm, captures the caller’s name, address, and what’s happening, and flags it as urgent in your calendar. If you’re set up for emergency dispatch, it can provide your on-call details or trigger a priority alert to your phone.

faqVariants.q: Will it quote prices for my plumbing jobs?
faqVariants.a: Only if you want it to. Most plumbers configure it to capture the details and book a time — quoting stays with you. It will never make up a price or commit you to anything you haven’t approved.

painPoints.body: A switchboard fault on a Friday night is your best-paying job of the week — if you answer. Most electricians don’t. Jackal does, every time, in under a second.

painPoints.body: Jackal is configured with your licence number, coverage area, and the reassurances customers need. It answers their first questions before they even think about calling someone else.

faqVariants.a: Yes. Jackal is configured to capture the nature of the fault, location, and urgency — and flag high-priority calls so you know which ones need an immediate call back versus a scheduled inspection.

faqVariants.a: Jackal is set up with your licence number, insurance details, and coverage area. It handles those reassurance questions so callers don’t move on to someone else while you’re on site.

locationPages.heroSub: Perth’s tradie market is competitive. The business that answers first gets the job. Jackal answers your calls 24/7 so you’re always first — even when you’re on the tools in Bayswater or flat out in Mandurah.

painPoints.heading: Perth’s tradie market: they call three numbers and go with whoever answers.
painPoints.body: In a city of 2 million people, competition between tradies is tight. The job goes to the first person who picks up — not the best tradie, not the cheapest. Jackal makes sure that’s always you.

painPoints.body: From Rockingham to Joondalup, Perth tradies get emergency calls outside business hours. Jackal answers every one of them — burst pipes at midnight, power faults on weekends, AC breakdowns in 40-degree heat.

painPoints.heading: Perth is a big city. Your calls shouldn’t fall through the cracks.
painPoints.body: Whether you’re covering the northern suburbs, the south, or the hills — Jackal captures the suburb in every call so you can triage, route, and quote with the right information.

faqVariants.q: Is Jackal AI based in Perth?
faqVariants.a: Yes. Jackal AI is built in Perth, Western Australia. We understand the local tradie market, the suburbs, and the way Perth customers think. ABN 92 509 551 334.

faqVariants.a: Plumbers, electricians, builders, roofers, landscapers, air conditioning technicians, painters, tilers, carpenters — if you take calls and book jobs, Jackal can answer for you.
